Our Advocacy

The Platform

Student welfare is at the heart of LUMINA. We want every Ignatian to feel included, valued, supported, and heard—regardless of strand or grade level.

01

Donation Drive

Support students and communities in need through school-supply donation drives and outreach programs.

02

Proyektong Lawak

Make council news, activities, and projects easier to reach through accessible online channels.

03

Every Voice Matters

Listen to student concerns, suggestions, and ideas with fairness, respect, and genuine attention.

04

Transparency

Build trust through regular, clear updates on council projects, accomplishments, and finances.

05

Innovation

Improve successful programs and introduce thoughtful new ideas that benefit every Ignatian.

Objectives
